name: Sky Mavis (Ronin)
description: Developer platform for Ronin, an EVM blockchain purpose-built for games with permissionless deployment, low fees and gaming-centric infra.

seo.title: Sky Mavis (Ronin) — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Sky Mavis (Ronin): Developer platform for Ronin, an EVM blockchain purpose-built for games with permissionless deployment, low fees and gaming-centric infra.

when_to_use: EVM blockchain purpose-built for web3 gaming with low fees
NFT minting and in-game asset management via Ronin APIs
Wallet SDK and passport identity for blockchain game players
Low-cost on-chain transactions for play-and-earn game economies
Permissionless smart contract deployment on Ronin network

cons: Chain ecosystem smaller than Ethereum L2s
review.verdict: Niche but focused EVM for Web3 games, worth it only if you're committing to the Ronin ecosystem.
review.best_for: Web3 game studios targeting Ronin ecosystem with low-fee blockchain gaming infrastructure
review.not_for: Non-gaming Web3 apps or teams wanting Ethereum mainnet-level decentralization
